items.prompt: Which statement best summarizes a theme of the text?

options.text: Sharing things with others can lead to good friendships.
Greed tends to make you lose the things you wanted most.
Difficult problems can require careful teamwork to be solved.
Keeping secrets from your friends can cause them to doubt you.

items.prompt: What is the antonym of the word <u>suspicious</u> as it is used in paragraph 1 of the text?

Read the paragraph from the text.
After everything had settled, the birds and animals gathered again. Mouse noticed that where a banana branch had fallen, several banana trees had sprouted in the ground. Banana trees had never existed before. Tapir pointed out some corn growing a short distance away. There had never been corn plants before. Fruits and vegetables that had never grown anywhere but on the Food Tree were suddenly growing everywhere.
Pick the statement that best explains why the author chose to include this paragraph.

options.text: to convince the reader to plant a tree to help animals
to inform the reader about the types of plants that grow in the forest
to give an explanation to the reader about how something came to be
to provide the reader with opinions the characters have about the meeting

items.prompt:
Read the sentence from the text.

When the gigantic trunk hit the ground, the whole world shook.

Which statement best describes what the phrase the whole world shook in the sentence adds to the tone of the text.

options.text: The phrase adds a cheerful tone to the text.
The phrase adds a hopeless tone to the text.
The phrase adds a nervous tone to the text.
The phrase adds an exciting tone to the text.
